source.note: This seed is sufficient to bind DeepWiki prompts to the current Portal target, but should be refreshed with ACTE after RPC/network access is available.

machine_setup_seed.purpose: Canonical context copied into generated DeepWiki corpus repos by setup/setup.py.

target_repo_snapshot.purpose: Freshest Portal target snapshot available in this workspace; use it to override stale block, code-size, and common-view freshness fields when the address and implementation match.

audit_notes: Live balances, storage slots, and common view calls are captured from the proxy/live address when a proxy is present.
Private mappings and structs are not globally enumerable without known keys.
DeepWiki candidates must be checked against this block-specific live state before proof.

missing_until_acte_v3_refresh: full ABI inventory counts and function signatures
decoded recent event samples and event-derived mapping keys
parameterized view probes such as getTokenV*, getQuoteTokenConfiguration, getSaltLock, getLocks, hasRole, previewBuy, previewSell
ERC20/native balances for dependencies and quote tokens
dependency identity for routers, migrators, lockers, hooks, token implementations, tax processors, dividend modules, and pool managers
AccessControl role member inventory for admin/operator/config roles
quote-token configuration values, fee profile values, flap-fee profiles, and tax/dividend configuration for live tokens
event-derived token addresses, staged-token stagers, salt-lock keys, token beneficiaries, LP locks, redeem rates, and dex pool mapping keys
claimable beneficiary/dividend/LP-fee amounts and protocol liabilities that can be compared with live token/native balances
recent buy/sell/claim/migration/fee/recovery event samples around the live block for replayable local fork test setup
deepwiki_audit_focus: Treat this as the current protocol and reject stale Sable or Morpho context.
Prioritize concrete unprivileged extraction from the live proxy balance, quote-token balances, launched-token reserves, tax/dividend funds, LP fees, salt locks, migration proceeds, and claim paths.
Check payable launch/swap/buy paths against required msg.value, fee accounting, refund behavior, permit/quote-token branches, and external router or migrator callbacks.
Check bonding-curve reserve/supply math, reserve-token decimals, DEX threshold transitions, migration state, and packed token state for value-creating rounding or stale-state bugs.
Check claim/recovery functions only for attacker-triggerable overclaim or unauthorized redirection; admin compromise alone is not a valid critical path.
audit_notes: Portal is a BSC transparent-style proxy with admin and implementation slot data captured.
The proxy held 1361.664283849714242664 BNB at the captured block, so custody and payable accounting paths are high priority.
This seed intentionally replaces stale Morpho/Sable live context and should be refreshed by running ACTE's upgraded scanner before a full DeepWiki campaign.
